summary: Fully live applied the remaining runtime-pool transition from the latest exact-main baseline by replaying the runtime-control pool against `origin/main@630f663bd4b35214ef866df0772acef48a6ac6fe`, correcting the stale Windmill ntfy resource path and the mail-platform `created|...` startup-state false negative that only surfaced during that replay, verifying the runtime-general and runtime-control substrate plus Nomad contracts, and retiring the legacy control-plane copies from `docker-runtime-lv3` before the governed post-apply restic backup trigger completed.

verification.observed: The final exact-main replay preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-runtime-control-mainline-live-apply-r28.txt` completed with zero failures across `runtime-control-lv3`, `postgres-lv3`, `proxmox-host`, `nginx-lv3`, `monitoring-lv3`, and the remaining production guests, while the tail of the same receipt shows the runtime-control substrate route verification and the retirement of legacy control-plane copies from `docker-runtime-lv3`.

verification.check: Runtime-pool post-apply substrate, route, and Nomad verification
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-runtime-pool-post-verify-r2.txt` recorded healthy Dapr metadata on both runtime pools, successful runtime-control route checks for API Gateway, OpenFGA, and Windmill, successful runtime-general route checks for Homepage, Uptime Kuma, and Mailpit, ready Nomad clients in both the `runtime-general` and `runtime-control` namespaces, green public edge probes for `home.example.com`, `uptime.example.com`, and `status.example.com`, the expected mTLS-only OpenBao behavior, a healthy repo-managed `step-ca` runtime healthcheck, the retired legacy control-plane set on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and the live memory allocations plus capacity-governance summary.

verification.check: Controller-visible public and private endpoint sweep
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-controller-probes-r1.json` captured green controller-side probes for `https://api.example.com/healthz`, `https://registry.example.com/api/v2.0/ping`, `https://sso.example.com/realms/lv3/.well-known/openid-configuration`, `https://home.example.com`, `https://uptime.example.com`, `https://status.example.com`, `https://vault.example.com/alive`, plus the private Gitea, Windmill, Semaphore, OpenFGA, and step-ca management proxies.

verification.check: OpenBao mTLS and step-ca health-gated runtime verification
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-openbao-mtls-verify-r1.txt` captured the first corrected controller-side OpenBao mTLS proof after the stale bare-curl check failed, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-step-ca-healthcheck-live-apply-r1.txt` captured the successful bounded step-ca replay used to keep the runtime under a repo-managed compose healthcheck, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-runtime-pool-post-verify-r2.txt` confirmed the resulting healthy `step-ca` runtime state.

The `live-apply-service` restic trigger at the end of `r28` completed successfully and refreshed `receipts/restic-backups/20260405T101939Z.json` plus `receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json`, recording protected backups for both `config/` and `versions/stack.yaml`.

notes: The duplicate `r26` runtime-control replay was terminated in favor of the newer corrected replay so only `r28` is treated as the authoritative exact-main result.

OpenBao remains protected by the private mTLS proxy contract, so this receipt treats the local health checks inside the successful exact-main apply as the authoritative OpenBao verification and uses controller-side probes only for the endpoints that are intentionally reachable from the controller environment.

The first post-apply verification sweep (`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-05-ws-0331-runtime-pool-post-verify-r1.txt`) surfaced a stale bare-curl OpenBao probe in `docs/runbooks/configure-runtime-control-pool.md`, so `r2` is the authoritative final verification sweep after the runbook and proof set were corrected.

ADR 0322 remains repo-implemented only after this closeout because the live platform still lacks a Nomad Autoscaler controller and scale-action receipts; this receipt covers the runtime-pool, memory-envelope, and mobility-wave live state rather than a live autoscaling rollout.

The final integration step on `main` updates the repo truth to `0.178.6` and the verified live platform truth to `0.130.100`; this receipt intentionally preserves the exact-main apply context that was current while the live replay ran.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main runtime-pool closeout for runtime-control and the remaining shared-runtime retirement work
correction_loop.repair_action: Switched the Windmill-seeded ntfy resource path from the stale `ntfy/platform` identifier to `f/lv3/ntfy_platform`, adjusted the mail-platform runtime startup evaluation so the expected `created|...` compose state no longer fails the live replay, and reran the exact-main runtime-control workstream until the final authoritative replay completed cleanly.
correction_loop.verification: Replay `r28`, the runtime-pool post-verify sweep, and the controller-visible endpoint probes all passed, with the legacy control-plane copies retired from `docker-runtime-lv3` and the governed restic backup trigger succeeding afterward.
